mapper.insert: insert into submission_case_results ( submission_id, testcase_id, case_index, judge_status, run_time_ms, memory_kb, expected_output, actual_output, error_message, created_at ) values ( #{submissionId}, #{testcaseId}, #{caseIndex}, #{judgeStatus}, #{runTimeMs}, #{memoryKb}, #{expectedOutput}, #{actualOutput}, #{errorMessage}, now() )
mapper.select:
select count(1) from submission_case_results where submission_id = #{submissionId}
and judge_status <> 'ACCEPTED'
